testcase.name: test_delete_nonexistent_pet()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Кодответа несовпал с ожидаемым. ОтветPet deleted ==> expected: <201> but was: <200>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Кодответа несовпал с ожидаемым. ОтветPet deleted ==> expected: <201> but was: <200> at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:150) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:559) at app//TestPet.test_delete_nonexistent_pet(TestPet.java:22) at java.base@21.0.10/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base@21.0.10/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base@21.0.10/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
